title: selliguea neglecta
intro: Selliguea neglecta, also known as Pilea nummulariifolia or Chinese money plant, is a plant species that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selliguea neglecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be applied topically to wounds and skin conditions.
